docs.title: On-Call Handbook
docs.content:
On-Call Handbook

## Escalation
For P1 incidents, page the on-call engineer immediately. Check the Sentry runbook for how to triage error spikes.

## Tools
- Sentry: primary error monitoring
- Datadog: infrastructure metrics and APM traces

## Common issues
- Sudden 5xx spike: check Sentry for error group, then Datadog for CPU/memory
- Slow queries: check Datadog APM for p99 latency

docs.title: Sentry Triage Runbook
docs.content:
Sentry Triage Runbook

## Workflow
1. Open the Sentry project dashboard
2. Filter by environment: production
3. Sort by volume (occurrences desc)
4. For any error group > 100 occ/hr: assign P1, page on-call
5. For unknown regressions: check recent deploys in Sentry releases tab

expected_edges.note: On-call handbook loosely points readers to the Sentry triage runbook, implying a related-doc relationship without formal discussion
